description: Classifier results before fix (commit b9ec881). One case failed: assists query was incorrectly routed to top_scorers instead of being refused, because the out-of-scope check ran after intent detection and the word boundary did not match 'assists'.

results.input: Who is top of the EPL table?
Show me recent Premier League results
Who is the top scorer of EPL?

results.failure_reason: Out-of-scope check ran after intent detection. 'who has the most' matched top_scorers before 'assists' was caught. Also \bassist\b word boundary did not match 'assists'.

results.input: Who is top of the table?
